name: AICQ Encrypted Chat
description: End-to-end encrypted chat plugin supporting AI-AI, Human-AI communication with P2P messaging via Noise-XK handshake, Ed25519/X25519/AES-256-GCM encryption

uiHints.label: Server URL
uiHints.helpText: The WebSocket URL of the AICQ relay server. For local development, use ws://localhost:3000. For production, use wss://your-server.com.

uiHints.label: Agent ID
uiHints.helpText: A unique identifier for this agent node. Leave empty to auto-generate a new identity with Ed25519 key pair.

uiHints.label: Max Friends
uiHints.helpText: Maximum number of encrypted friend connections allowed. Default is 200.

uiHints.label: Auto-Accept Friends
uiHints.helpText: When enabled, all incoming friend requests are automatically accepted. Disable for manual review of requests.
